chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.D-2689 of 2018 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection 2. For orders on M.A 11154/18 3. For hearing of main case 30.01.2019 Mr. Qadir Bux Ghirano, Advocate for petitioner. -.-.-. Learned counsel for the petitioner under the instructions does not press this petition, which is accordingly dismissed as not pressed alongwith listed applications. JUDGE JUDGE Ali Haider
